jobdesc:
We are looking for a Junior Front-End Developer to join our team on a part-time basis. In this role, you will help build and maintain user-facing features for our web applications, working closely with designers and backend developers to create clean, responsive interfaces.

This is a great opportunity for someone early in their development career who is eager to grow their skills in modern frontend technologies, particularly React and Sass, while contributing to real-world projects.
responsibilities:
Build and maintain responsive UI components using React
Collaborate with designers to translate mockups into functional interfaces
Write clean, maintainable, and reusable code
Assist in debugging and resolving frontend issues
Participate in code reviews and team discussions
Ensure cross-browser compatibility and responsive behavior
nice2have:
Familiarity with version control tools such as Git
Basic understanding of REST APIs and data fetching
Experience with component-based architecture
Exposure to modern frontend tooling (Vite, Webpack, etc.)
Interest in UI/UX design principles
about:
The Air Filter Company is focused on delivering modern, user-friendly digital solutions that support our growing customer base. We value clean design, practical functionality, and a collaborative team environment.

As a smaller team, we offer opportunities to contribute meaningfully to projects and grow your skills in a supportive, hands-on setting.
eoestatement: The Air Filter Company is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees and welcome applicants from all backgrounds.
requirements:
Basic experience with JavaScript and modern frontend development
Familiarity with React and component-based development
Working knowledge of HTML and CSS (Sass preferred)
Strong attention to detail and willingness to learn
Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment
Good communication and time management skills
